Bidirectional positive feedback: IL-12 -> STAT4 -> IFN-gamma in NK/T, and IFN-gamma -> STAT1 -> Il12b in DCs/macs.  Direction is cell-type-dependent in vivo; excluded from signed accuracy per the user pre-reg.
IL-15 (and IL-2/IL-12/IL-18) drives NK-cell IFN-gamma production in vivo (§2.7 paper-validated NK cascade).  IL-15 upstream -> expected_sign = -1.
